The Plant Uncaria tomentosa, also known as Cat's Claw, is a type of vine native to the Amazon rainforest. The health benefits of Cat's Claw include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, and boost the immune system. The bioactive constituents of Cat's Claw include alkaloids, such as oxindole and indole alkaloids, as well as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The most common herbal preparations made with Cat's Claw include capsules, tinctures, and teas, which are often used to treat conditions such as arthritis, digestive issues, and viral infections.
